property.name: structuredMessage
property.description: Transfer object that defines the schema for structured response from the LLM.

property.name: aiConfigurationName
property.description: The configuration name of ai configuration

property.name: maxRetries
property.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for the request in case of failures. Defaults to 1.

property.name: toolSetNames
property.description: List of AI tool set names.

property.name: conversationReference
property.description: Optional conversation identifier for chat history persistence. When provided, enables storage-backed conversation history.

property.name: structuredMessage
property.description: Transfer object containing the structured response data returned by the LLM.

property.name: isSuccessful
property.description: Indicates whether the prompt request was successful.

property.name: errors
property.description: List of errors encountered during the prompt request, if any.

property.name: toolInvocations
property.description: List of tool invocations executed by the LLM during prompt processing.

property.name: type
property.description: Message type: user, assistant, tool_call, or tool_result

property.name: name
property.description: The unique identifier of the tool that was called.

property.name: arguments
property.description: The parameters passed to the tool during execution.

property.name: result
property.description: The result returned after executing the tool.

property.name: conversationReference
property.description: Unique identifier for a conversation thread.

property.name: messages
property.description: Collection of conversation messages in PromptMessage format.

property.name: originalMessages
property.description: JSON-encoded array of raw provider response.

property.name: createdAt
property.description: Timestamp of when the conversation history was created.

property.name: updatedAt
property.description: Timestamp of when the conversation history was last updated.

property.name: conversationHistoryConditions
property.description: Filtering conditions for conversation histories.

property.name: conversationReferences
property.description: Conversation references to retrieve history for. Uses IN operation - each reference retrieves one conversation.

property.name: conversationHistories
property.description: Collection of conversation histories.
